response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and strong entrepreneurial drive, his background is predominantly tactical and implementation-focused rather than strategic. The role requires a Director-level Principal Engineer with recognized, deep AI expertise and a proven track record of advising strategic enterprise customers. Bogdan's AI experience is limited to recent tooling work, and his career history lacks the executive-level strategic and advisory scope necessary for this position.
strengths: Over 15 years of full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience across diverse technologies.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative by founding open-source platforms and organizing technical workshops.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
concerns: Lacks the Director-level strategic scope required for this role, having primarily worked in tactical engineering positions.
Does not possess deep, recognized expertise or an advanced degree in Artificial Intelligence or Machine Learning.
Missing demonstrated experience advising strategic enterprise customers on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption.
